zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前BNB对美元整体呈现窄幅震荡偏弱格局，价格围绕606附近整理，短线动能不足，市场情绪偏谨慎，多空在区间内博弈明显。  

技术指标方面，价格已跌破SMA20均线607.27附近，短期均线压制明显。MACD维持负值区间运行，空头动能略占优势，反弹力度有限。  

支撑位关注605.7一线及日内低点605.8附近，若失守或进一步下探风险加大。上方阻力集中在608.3及607.3均线压力区，突破需放量确认。  

操作上建议维持区间思路，高抛低吸为主，未有效突破608前不宜追多。若跌破605支撑可短线顺势做空，严格控制仓位与止损执行纪律。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD is currently exhibiting a mild consolidation phase following a period of limited volatility, with price action hovering just above the short-term support zone. Trading near 606, the market remains slightly below the 20-day SMA, suggesting a modest bearish bias without strong directional conviction. Overall structure reflects range-bound behavior between 605 and 608, indicating indecision and equilibrium between buyers and sellers.

MACD reading at -2.02 reinforces short-term bearish momentum, though lack of signal line data limits crossover interpretation. Absence of RSI restricts overbought/oversold assessment, but price compression suggests declining volatility. Momentum indicators collectively point to cautious sentiment rather than aggressive selling, implying the market is awaiting a catalyst for directional expansion.

Immediate support is located at 605.77, aligned with recent intraday lows, followed by psychological support at 600 and deeper structural support near 595. On the upside, resistance is defined by the 20-day SMA at 607.27, with stronger resistance at 608.31, the recent high. A decisive break above this zone could open path toward 615, where prior supply may re-emerge.

Trading strategy favors range participation until breakout confirmation. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight risk control below 605, targeting mid-range resistance around 607–608. Alternatively, a breakout above 608.3 with volume could justify momentum long positions toward 615. Conservative participants may wait for clearer trend alignment, as current structure remains neutral-to-slightly bearish.
